title: MusicScope Frontend Implementation - Music Streaming with Mood-Based Recommendations

requirements.summary: Create Home page displaying all songs with playback functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Home page fetches and displays all songs
Each song card shows title, artist, album, duration
Clicking a song triggers playback in persistent player
List is scrollable with smooth scrolling behavior

file_operations.description: Create Home page component that fetches all songs via backend capability, displays them in a scrollable list with song cards showing title, artist, album, and duration. Each song card triggers playback when clicked by updating the global player context. Include loading states and error handling.

Create reusable SongCard component that displays song information (title, artist, album, duration) with hover effects and click handler to trigger playback. Apply gradient accents and smooth animations per the interactive UI requirement.
Wire Home page into routing at route '/' and ensure Layout component wraps all routes with PlayerContext provider for persistent player functionality.

requirements.summary: Create Artists/Albums page with grouped, expandable sections and playback
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays artists with their albums in grouped sections
Sections are expandable/collapsible
Songs within each album clickable for playback
Shows placeholder art when album art unavailable

file_operations.description: Create Artists page that fetches songs grouped by artist and album via backend capabilities. Display expandable/collapsible sections for each artist and album. Use the generated album placeholder image at frontend/public/assets/generated/album-placeholder.dim_400x400.png when album art is unavailable. Each song is clickable to trigger playback.

Create expandable artist section component with smooth animations for expand/collapse transitions. Display albums within each artist with album art or placeholder, and nested song lists that trigger playback when clicked.
Add Artists page to routing at route '/artists' and include navigation link in Layout component.

requirements.summary: Create Search page with real-time filtering and playback
acceptanceCriteria: Search input filters songs client-side or server-side
Results update in real-time as user types
Clicking a result triggers playback
Shows 'no results' message when search yields nothing

file_operations.description: Create Search page with search input that filters songs in real-time via backend search capability. Display filtered results as song cards, show 'no results' message with the music note icon at frontend/public/assets/generated/music-note-icon.dim_128x128.png when search yields nothing. Each result triggers playback when clicked.
Create custom hook to debounce search input for optimized backend queries. Returns debounced value after specified delay to prevent excessive API calls during typing.
Add Search page to routing at route '/search' and include navigation link in Layout component.

requirements.summary: Create Dashboard page with colorful charts visualizing listening history
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows at least 2 chart types (bar and line)
Charts display listening history data with colorful styling
Time period filter buttons (day/week/month/year) update charts
Charts are responsive and animated

file_operations.description: Create Dashboard page that fetches listening history via backend capability filtered by time period (day/week/month/year). Display colorful bar and line charts using a charting library (recharts). Include time period filter buttons with gradient accents. Charts should be responsive and animated.
Create chart component that renders listening history data as colorful bar and line charts. Accept time-aggregated data as props and apply vibrant color palette with smooth animations.
Add Dashboard page to routing at route '/dashboard' and include navigation link in Layout component.

requirements.summary: Create Profile page displaying user stats and liked/downloaded songs
acceptanceCriteria: Profile displays user Principal ID and contact
Shows total counts for liked and downloaded songs
Lists liked songs with ability to play or remove
Lists downloaded songs with ability to play
Allows editing contact information

file_operations.description: Create Profile page that fetches user profile via backend capability. Display user Principal ID, contact information (editable), counts of liked and downloaded songs. Show lists of liked and downloaded songs with playback functionality. Include remove button for liked songs that calls backend capability to update the list.
Create form component for editing user contact information with inline editing or modal dialog. Include validation and save functionality that calls backend profile update capability.
Add Profile page to routing at route '/profile' and include navigation link in Layout component.

requirements.summary: Implement persistent music player component with full playback controls
acceptanceCriteria: Player component persists when navigating between pages
Displays currently playing song title, artist, album art
Play/pause, previous, next buttons functional
Progress bar shows playback position and allows seeking
Volume control adjusts playback volume

file_operations.description: Create persistent music player component using HTML5 audio API. Display current song info (title, artist, album art or placeholder at frontend/public/assets/generated/album-placeholder.dim_400x400.png). Include play/pause, previous, next controls, seekable progress bar, and volume control. Component persists across route changes via global state management.

Create React context for global player state management. Manage current song, playback state, queue, volume, and progress. Provide methods to play, pause, skip, seek, and update queue. Ensure state persists across page navigation.
Create custom hook to access PlayerContext. Returns player state and control methods for components to interact with the global music player.

Create layout component that wraps all pages with consistent header/navigation and the persistent MusicPlayer component at the bottom. Use the hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-music-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as a backdrop for the header with gradient overlay. Include navigation links with hover effects and smooth transitions.

requirements.summary: Implement mood-based auto-queue functionality with automatic playback
acceptanceCriteria: When song finishes, player fetches recommendations based on current song mood
Next song automatically starts playing
Queue shows upcoming recommended songs
User can skip to next recommendation or manually select different song

file_operations.description: Create custom hook that listens to song end events via the HTML5 audio 'ended' event. When current song finishes, fetch mood-based recommendations from backend capability using current song's mood. Automatically update player queue and start playback of next recommended song. Handle edge cases like empty recommendations.

Create queue panel component that displays upcoming songs from the auto-queue. Show song title, artist, and mood. Allow user to reorder, remove, or skip to specific songs in queue. Apply smooth animations for queue updates.

requirements.summary: Design vibrant, interactive UI with animations and gradient accents
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements have hover effects
Page transitions and component animations are smooth
Gradient accents used in headers, buttons, or backgrounds
Color palette is vibrant and cohesive across all pages
Typography and spacing create visual hierarchy

file_operations.description: Update global styles to include vibrant color palette with CSS custom properties for primary, secondary, and accent colors. Add gradient definitions, smooth transition utilities, and animation keyframes. Define hover effect styles for interactive elements. Ensure typography scale and spacing create clear visual hierarchy.

Extend Tailwind configuration with custom vibrant color palette, gradient utilities, and animation definitions. Add custom transition durations and easing functions for smooth animations. Configure typography and spacing scales for visual hierarchy.
